# <Runbook title>

## Purpose

Describe when this runbook should be used.

## Preconditions

List required access, tools, backups and safety checks.

## Symptoms

List observable signals that identify the scenario.

## Diagnosis

Provide safe, ordered and reproducible diagnostic commands.

## Recovery procedure

Provide numbered steps, expected results and stop conditions.

## Validation

Explain how to confirm service recovery and data integrity.

## Rollback

Describe how to reverse changes safely.

## Escalation

Define when and to whom the incident must be escalated.

## Evidence

List logs and metrics that may be retained without exposing sensitive data.
